summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, data pipelines, and consumer-facing products. Passionate about bridging product strategy and engineering execution.

bullets: Designed and shipped a high-throughput event-processing pipeline handling 50k events/sec using Python and Kafka, reducing downstream latency by 40%.
Partnered with product and data teams to define technical specifications and deliver three major platform features on schedule.
Built automated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions cutting deployment time from 45 to 8 minutes.
Instrumented production services with Datadog dashboards and alerts, reducing mean time to detection by 60%.

projects.name: OpenSearch Indexer
bullets: Built a Python-based async indexing service that syncs PostgreSQL records to OpenSearch in near real-time.
Implemented exponential back-off retry logic and dead-letter queues, achieving 99.9% indexing reliability.
Open-sourced with full test coverage and a Docker Compose dev environment for easy local setup.

projects.name: Budget Tracker CLI
bullets: Developed a terminal-based personal finance tool using Typer and Rich with SQLite persistence.
Added CSV import, category tagging, and monthly summary reports with trend visualizations.
Packaged as a pip-installable tool with cross-platform support for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
